title: Latent Memory Field
caption: Memory appears as a navigable field, not a timeline.

title: Proximity Is Relevance
caption: Memory is retrieved by emotional adjacency, not chronological order.

title: Source Corpus
caption: Every fragment must retain its source, consent context, timestamp where relevant, and transformation history.

title: Whisper Breath Chunks
caption: Audio is divided by embodied rhythm.

title: Drift Algorithm
caption: The system wanders without losing relation.

title: Tuning Rules
caption: Human-authored rules preserve discontinuity and prevent automatic retrieval from presenting similarity as a finished story.

title: Source to Output
caption: The memory field produces a traceable response.

title: Against Fake Coherence
caption: The enemy is not silence. The enemy is false coherence.

title: OSC / MIDI Signal
caption: Retrieved fragments can send control data to a sonic environment while their provenance remains available for inspection.

title: Relation to SIWUE / TEBR / STTM
caption: DERIVE connects manuscript, sonic folklore, and embodied instrument.

title: Unresolved Fragment
caption: The system preserves rupture instead of repairing it.
